yt-dlp

yt-dlp

Feature-rich command-line downloader for supported media sites.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • macOS
  • Windows

Catalog 2026.07.14.1 · bundled development fixture; CLI authentication is authoritative

Source and releases (configured by the deploying repository) · No runtime backend
